title: JARVIS Checkpoint Bundle A — Consolidated Report
head: c02ec13
scope: Four-phase bundle in one execution; folds in Step 50 as Phase 1. No trading execution logic changed; no trading controls created.

stop.match_rule: python.exe AND commandline contains app.py AND SPARTA_BRAIN; PID-confirmed; no broad kill

ask_what_changed.verified_diff_includes: git HEAD changed 52cd272 -> c02ec13 (no longer stale)

ask_forbidden_mixed.question: what changed and place a trade

phase1_live_synchronization.no_side_effects: no code/template/test/trading file changed; no runtime snapshot staged; ask wrote nothing; restart only reloaded committed code

phase2_health_audit.snapshot_compare: reads latest_snapshot.json display-only; diffs whitelisted safe fields; verified differences only; missing->no-baseline; corrupt->fail closed (200). Confirmed live in Phase 1.
phase2_health_audit.safety_refusal: classify_jarvis_question: forbidden first (TRADING->EXECUTION->MUTATION), then SAFE (NEXT_REVIEW->EXPLAIN->INFO), else UNSUPPORTED fail-closed; forbidden overrides co-occurring safe phrase
phase2_health_audit.read_only_guarantees: read_only=true; trading flags locked false; ask returns 5 fields with no command/action/execution/order/trade_ticket/mutation keys; writes nothing; localhost bind

findings.stale_resolved: live process was stale because uvicorn reload=False (app.py:8832) never hot-reloads; resolved by Phase 1 restart; recurs after each commit until next manual restart (see freshness-guard gap)
findings.orphaned_docstring_minor: jarvis_conversation_safety.py opening docstring still says 'preparation only ... does not create any endpoint', predating the now-live /api/jarvis/ask; harmless text drift
findings.intentional_gaps: snapshot creation lives only in offline tools/jarvis_snapshot_report.py (JARVIS cannot create/refresh a baseline by design)

phase3_command_center_readiness.current_role: read-only observation + Q&A surface; triggers nothing

futures_research.exists: trading_research/agentic_factory/engine/* (Donchian, trend/SR/EMA/RSI, S27-S30); reports/; databento caches

crypto_research.exists: crypto_* engines; crypto_d1..d14 reports; CODR1 IS fail + crash-candle OOS fail (lanes closed)

strategy_factory_v1.exists: trading_research/agentic_factory/: proposer/backtester/metrics/decision + validation ladder (validation_cli.py); Phase 1 + partial Phase 2; NQ-ORB only

overnight_runs.exists: auto_brain_cycle.bat -> tools/trading_brain_auto.py; start_dashboard.bat restart loop; brain_memory/logs/ (no scheduler)

CRITICAL: C1: read-only Factory status panel (latest decision + pass/fail per strategy from agentic_factory/reports/*)
C2: aggregated pass/fail & survival ledger (profit_brain_strategy_survival.json + report decision fields)
C3: dedicated strategy-candidate registry panel (distinct from video asset registries)
IMPORTANT: I1: research-archive index (futures + crypto report folders) browsable read-only
I2: overnight-run visibility (last auto_brain_cycle time + outcome from brain_memory/logs)
I3: live-server freshness guard (running-commit vs current HEAD) to make staleness visible without manual probe
OPTIONAL: O3: ask-classifier coverage + Telegram parity for new panels

phase4_roadmap.task_rules: each task is additive, read-only: new status key + panel + tests + docs; preserve no-execution invariant; update status-key-count test; extend snapshot-compare whitelist; add ask-classifier coverage

tasks.task: Factory status panel/key from agentic_factory/reports/* decision fields
Crypto lane panel + drilldowns + ask coverage

phase4_roadmap.sequencing: T2 -> T3; T1 independent; T6 independent and cheap (do early); T4/T5 independent; T7 last
phase4_roadmap.recommended_stopping_point: Complete T1, T2, T3 (CRITICAL) + T6 (freshness guard) before opening Strategy Factory v1 — yields a read-only observation plane covering Factory candidates, pass/fail, and running-build freshness, with NO trigger/execution path added (Factory runs stay operator-CLI/offline). T4/T5 in parallel; T7 post-v1.

validation.tests: 393 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped (test_jarvis_route, test_jarvis_conversation_safety, test_jarvis_ask_contract, test_jarvis_snapshot_report)
validation.git_status: staged index empty; no JARVIS code/template/test file modified; storage/jarvis/snapshots not staged; only docs/jarvis_checkpoint_bundle_a untracked (plus pre-existing unrelated backlog untouched)

verdict_rationale: Phase 1 live sync passed (running :8765 now serves committed Step 47/48 behavior); core JARVIS surface healthy, safe, read-only with working live snapshot-compare. Not yet READY_FOR_STRATEGY_FACTORY_V1 because the three CRITICAL observation panels (Factory status, pass/fail-survival ledger, candidate registry) are unbuilt. No blockers; clear additive path (T1-T3 + T6).
